---
title: "About Me"
---

## Background

My name is Oliver Reece. I hold a B.A. in Quantitative Economics, Minor in Statistics & Data Science from Lawrence University. 
At Lawrence (outside of my studies) I competed on the NCAA Men's Fencing Team, held part-time jobs in the office of SEAL and 
in the on-campus bar. I have a passion for investing and quantitative research, and as such hope to be able to merge these together
into a career as an investment banking analyst or private equity analyst. In these roles I would aspire to make meaningful 
investments that would lead to the betterment of the world I live in all while developing as an individual, an academic, and a professional.

## Academic Interests

- Data Analysis and Data Manipulation
- Machine learning and Predictive Modeling  
- Economics & Quantitative Research
- Investment and Portfolio Management
- Financial Modelling

## Extracurricular Interests

- Snowboarding
- Mountain Biking
- Football (Soccer)
- Fencing
- Hiking
- Camping

## Contact Information

If you need to reach me, feel free to reach me at my email: [email](mailto:oliver.j.reece66@gmail.com)
or via LinkedIn: [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/oliver-reece).
